title: Mass Shooting at Winston-Salem Park Leaves Two Dead
summary: A mass shooting at Leinbach Park in Winston-Salem resulted in two fatalities and several injuries, prompting a police investigation.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the ongoing issue of gun violence and its devastating impact on communities in North Carolina.

title: Leistritz Extrusion to Host Reactive Extrusion Workshop
summary: Leistritz Extrusion will host a Reactive Extrusion (REX) Workshop at the Polymers Center of Excellence in Charlotte, NC.
charlotte_impact: Showcases advancements and educational opportunities in polymer science and extrusion technology in the Charlotte area.

title: Union County School Board Approves $174 Million Budget
summary: The Union County school board approved a $174 million budget, prioritizing staff compensation with projected 5% raises.
charlotte_impact: Addresses funding priorities and investments in education within Union County, particularly focusing on teacher compensation.

title: Charlotte Water Leak Unfixed for a Year Amid Drought
summary: A WCNC Charlotte investigation revealed a significant water leak left unrepaired for almost a year, amidst mandatory water restrictions.
charlotte_impact: Exposes infrastructure issues and potential mismanagement of water resources during a critical drought period.

title: Charlotte-Mecklenburg Homelessness Rises 12%
summary: Homelessness in Charlotte-Mecklenburg has increased by 12%, with over 2,000 individuals without shelter, signaling a growing crisis.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the escalating homelessness problem and the strain on resources in the Charlotte-Mecklenburg area.

title: Cooler and Drier Weather Forecast for Friday

title: Suspect Arrested in Richmond County Shooting
summary: A suspect has been arrested following a shooting in Richmond County where the victim was hospitalized with chest and leg wounds.
charlotte_impact: Reports on local crime and law enforcement efforts in Richmond County.

title: Burn Ban Lifted in Mecklenburg County Amid Drought Recovery
summary: The open burning ban has been lifted in Mecklenburg County and 18 others due to recent rainfall, though drought risks remain.
charlotte_impact: Informs residents about changes in fire restrictions and ongoing drought concerns.

title: Court Upholds Conviction of Madalina Cojocari's Stepfather

title: Crash Closes Portion of US-74 Near Shelby

charlotte_impact: Details the findings of an investigation into a fatal industrial accident.

title: Luke Combs Receives Honorary Degree from App State

title: CMS Board to Review Updated Budget Proposal

title: Neese’s Sausage Disappears from North Carolina Shelves
summary: Neese’s sausage products have vanished from shelves across North Carolina, leaving customers and restaurants searching.

title: Former Daycare Worker Indicted for Murder in Toddler's Death
summary: A former daycare worker was indicted for murder after allegedly causing the death of a toddler in her care.
